## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly leadership sync to discuss hiring, team management, and strategic priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Urgent need to improve delegation, training, and role clarity to address Marcel's workload and scaling challenges](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Decision made to terminate Traiters (content team member) by Friday due to performance issues](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [New hiring process yielding strong candidates; focus on higher-level "managing editor" roles vs. production-level content creators](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Shift towards more technical, higher-value content engagements (e.g. Galileo, Strapi) requiring specialized expertise](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

## Topics

### Workload and Delegation Challenges

  - [Marcel experiencing burnout from 8pm-midnight work sessions after childcare](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Small tasks piling up (e.g. invoice payments, chasing late payments)](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Post-sale client onboarding consuming significant time](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Considering hiring a sales/account management role to offload some work](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Need to improve training and onboarding processes for new team members](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)

### Hiring and Team Structure

  - [New hiring process yielding strong candidates with diverse backgrounds](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Shift towards hiring more senior "managing editor" roles ($6-7k/month) vs. production-level content creators](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Managing editors expected to lead strategy, client communication, and oversee execution](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Exploring US-based hires in addition to international talent](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Need to clarify roles and responsibilities, especially between managing editors and current team members](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)

### Client and Project Focus

  - [Trend towards more technical, higher-value content engagements (e.g. Galileo, Strapi)](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Opportunity to specialize in infrastructure, security, and technical content](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Aim to increase average engagement value from $9k to $15k per month](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Ideal structure: Managing editors handling 3-4 engagements each, supported by specialized writers/researchers](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

### Performance Management

  - [Decision to terminate Traiters (content team member) by Friday due to ongoing performance issues](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Jimmy to handle the termination conversation; Marcel to oversee access removal](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Need to communicate change sensitively, considering Traiters' connection to Andre (another team member)](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)

### Candidate Evaluation Process

  - [Current process includes video submissions and interviews](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [Considering AI assistance to summarize video content for easier review](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
  - [Emphasis on communication skills, strategic thinking, and adaptability over specific SEO knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jimmy to handle Traiters termination conversation by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Marcel to oversee removal of Traiters' system access (Slack, email, Notion, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Develop more comprehensive training curriculum for new hires](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [Clarify roles and responsibilities across the team, especially for managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Refine job descriptions and expectations for managing editor roles](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Explore AI assistance for candidate video review process](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
  - [Continue evaluating and interviewing high-potential candidates](https://fathom.video/share/c5UXhUB38LFEnDrsyWmEwenf5VsgsnNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
